scripts.build: npm run build -w @neontalk/contracts && npm run build -w @neontalk/db && npm run build -w @neontalk/api && npm run build -w @neontalk/ai-worker && npm run build -w @neontalk/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @neontalk/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @neontalk/db && npm run typecheck -w @neontalk/api && npm run typecheck -w @neontalk/ai-worker && npm run typecheck -w @neontalk/web
